name: Potato Chip Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together flour, baking powder, and salt.
2. Melt butter and chocolate in a microwave or saucepan.
3. Beat eggs well, then gradually add sugar, beating until smooth.
4. Add melted chocolate mixture and vanilla to the eggs, blending well.
5. Stir in the flour mixture.
6. Fold in crushed potato chips.
7. Pour batter into a lightly greased 8-inch square pan.
8. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 30-35 minutes.
9. Allow to cool slightly before cutting into squares.
